.bash_history N/A make -j8
.bash_history N/A sudo make install

.bash_history N/A sudo modprobe mt7902e

.bash_history N/A sudo mkdir -p /etc/apt/keyrings
.bash_history N/A curl -fsSL https://us-central1-apt.pkg.dev/doc/repo-signing-key.gpg | sudo gpg --dearmor --yes -o /etc/apt/keyrings/antigravity-repo-key.gpg
.bash_history N/A sudo apt install curl
.bash_history N/A curl -fsSL https://us-central1-apt.pkg.dev/doc/repo-signing-key.gpg | sudo gpg --dearmor --yes -o /etc/apt/keyrings/antigravity-repo-key.gpg
.bash_history N/A echo "deb [signed-by=/etc/apt/keyrings/antigravity-repo-key.gpg] https://us-central1-apt.pkg.dev/projects/antigravity-auto-updater-dev/ antigravity-debian main" | sudo tee /etc/apt/sources.list.d/antigravity.list > /dev/null
.bash_history N/A sudo apt update
.bash_history N/A sudo apt install antigravity
.bash_history N/A cd installer/
.bash_history N/A ./install.sh
.bash_history N/A systemctl restart forensicsuite-startup.service
.bash_history N/A echo report(datetime)
.bash_history N/A echo reportdatetime
.bash_history N/A echo report datetime
.bash_history N/A echo report $datetime
.bash_history N/A echo report $(datetime)
.bash_history N/A echo report $(date time)
.bash_history N/A echo report $(date )
.bash_history N/A echo report_$(date)
.bash_history N/A date --help
.bash_history N/A cp /home/alfongp/Documentos/Forensic-Suite-dashboard/data/report.html /home/alfongp/Documentos/Reportes/report1405
.bash_history N/A cp /home/alfongp/Documentos/Forensic-Suite-dashboard/data/report.html /home/alfongp/Documentos/Reportes/report1405.html
.bash_history N/A systemctl restart forensicsuite-startup.service
.bash_history N/A sudo chwon $USER:$USER /home/alfongp/Documentos/Reportes/report_20260514_101437.html
.bash_history N/A sudo chown $USER:$USER /home/alfongp/Documentos/Reportes/report_20260514_101437.html
.bash_history N/A sudo chmod 777 /home/alfongp/Documentos/Reportes/report_20260514_101437.html
.bash_history N/A systemctl restart forensicsuite-startup.service
.bash_history N/A systemctl restart forensicsuite
.bash_history N/A systemctl restart forensicsuite-dashboard.service
.bash_history N/A cd /home/alfongp/Documentos/Forensic-Suite-dashboard/installer/
.bash_history N/A sudo ./install.sh
.bash_history N/A systemctl status forensicsuite-remote.service
.bash_history N/A sudo ./install.sh
.bash_history N/A ls -l /root/.ssh/id_ed25519
.bash_history N/A sudo ls -l /root/.ssh/id_ed25519
.bash_history N/A sudo cat /root/.ssh/id_ed25519
.bash_history N/A sudo ls -l /root/.ssh/
.bash_history N/A ip a
.bash_history N/A sudo apt install ssh
.bash_history N/A ls -la
.bash_history N/A ls -la .ssh/
.bash_history N/A rm id_ed255*
.bash_history N/A rm /.ssh/id_ed255*
.bash_history N/A rm .ssh/id_ed255*
.bash_history N/A ls -la .ssh/
.bash_history N/A sudo nano .ssh/authorized_keys
.bash_history N/A sudo mkdir reports
.bash_history N/A sudo nano .ssh/authorized_keys
.bash_history N/A sudo ls reports/
.bash_history N/A sudo nano .ssh/authorized_keys
.bash_history N/A sudo ls reports/
.bash_history N/A # Iniciar el servicio y habilitarlo para que arranque con el sistema
.bash_history N/A sudo systemctl enable --now ssh
.bash_history N/A sudo ls reports/
.bash_history N/A sudo ufw allow ssh
.bash_history N/A # 2. Crear la carpeta de reportes
.bash_history N/A sudo mkdir -p ~/reports/
.bash_history N/A # 3. Darle la propiedad al usuario
.bash_history N/A sudo chown alfongp:alfongp ~/reports/
.bash_history N/A ls
.bash_history N/A ls ~/reports/
.bash_history N/A ls ~
.bash_history N/A # Entrar como el usuario receptor
.bash_history N/A sudo su - forensic_uploader
.bash_history N/A # Crear la carpeta .ssh y el archivo authorized_keys
.bash_history N/A mkdir -p ~/.ssh
.bash_history N/A chmod 700 ~/.ssh
.bash_history N/A touch ~/.ssh/authorized_keys
.bash_history N/A chmod 600 ~/.ssh/authorized_keys
.bash_history N/A exit
.bash_history N/A # Verificar que existe
.bash_history N/A sha256sum --version
.bash_history N/A systemctl status ssh
.bash_history N/A ls ~/reports/
.bash_history N/A ls /reports/
.bash_history N/A ls reports/
.bash_history N/A anydesk
.bash_history N/A ls
.bash_history N/A ./install.sh
.bash_history N/A ./install.sh anydesk
.bash_history N/A anydesk.desktop
.bash_history N/A ./anydesk
.bash_history N/A ./anydesk.desktop
.bash_history N/A ./anydesk
.bash_history N/A ./anydesk.desktop
.bash_history N/A ./anydesk
.bash_history N/A ./anydesk.desktop
.bash_history N/A ./anydesk
.bash_history N/A sudo apt update
.bash_history N/A sudo apt install anydesk

PATH=/usr/local/sbin:/usr/local/bin:/usr/sbin:/usr/bin:/snap/bin:/bin:/sbin

LOGNAME=root
HOME=/root
